summary: Push notification infrastructure and verified business badge testing - All backend tests passed (11/11). All frontend features working correctly. Push token registration/unregistration working, admin notification sending functional, notification history tracking working, push stats endpoint operational. Frontend displays all features correctly including ratings, detail pages, admin panel, search, and category filtering.
seed_data_creation: Test push tokens registered during testing. Test notifications sent and stored in notification history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification infrastructure fully functional. Public endpoints (register/unregister) work without auth. Admin endpoints (send, history, stats) require authentication. Notification sending integrates with Expo Push API (actual delivery only works on physical devices with valid tokens). Verified business badge (is_premium) field present and working in admin panel. All previous features (map, categories, search, reviews, ratings) continue to work correctly.

backend_tests_passed: POST /api/push/register with duplicate token updates existing record (upsert)
GET /api/admin/push-stats returns active device count (requires auth)
POST /api/admin/notifications/send sends notification with success/fail counts (requires auth)
POST /api/admin/notifications/send accepts empty title (no strict validation)
frontend_tests_passed: Main page loads with map, categories (6), and location cards (16)
Location cards display ratings (5.0, 4.0 stars visible)
Clicking location card navigates to /location/{id} detail page
Detail page shows location name, rating, service tags, description, working hours, phone
Back button navigates from detail page to main page
Admin panel button accessible from main page (settings icon)
Admin login page loads with email and password inputs
Admin login works with correct credentials (admin@gradacac.ba / Gradacac2024!)
Admin dashboard loads after successful login
Admin dashboard shows add location button and logout button
Back button navigates from admin dashboard to main page
Clear search button restores all locations
Category filter works (clicking category filters locations)

push_notification_infrastructure.expo_push_integration: ✓ Working - Integrates with Expo Push API (https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send)
push_notification_infrastructure.notification_record: ✓ Working - Stores notification history with total_devices, successful, failed counts
push_notification_infrastructure.auth_protection: ✓ Working - All admin endpoints return 401 without auth

verified_business_badge.is_premium_field: ✓ Working - Location model has is_premium boolean field
verified_business_badge.admin_toggle: ✓ Working - Admin edit modal has premium toggle checkbox
verified_business_badge.frontend_display: ✓ Working - Admin dashboard shows premium count

existing_features.search: ✓ Working - Search by name and address
existing_features.location_detail: ✓ Working - Full detail page with all fields
existing_features.reviews: ✓ Working - Review system with rating aggregation
existing_features.admin_crud: ✓ Working - Admin can create, update, delete locations
existing_features.admin_auth: ✓ Working - JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies

screenshots: /tmp/01_main_page.png - Main page with map, categories, location cards showing ratings
/tmp/02_location_detail.png - Location detail page (Restoran Stari Grad) with 5.0 rating, service tags, description
/tmp/03_admin_login.png - Admin login page with email/password inputs
/tmp/04_admin_dashboard.png - Admin dashboard with stats and location list
/tmp/05_category_filtered.png - Main page with category filter applied (Restorani - 3 locations)

backend.push_token_model: ✓ PushTokenRegister model with token and platform fields
backend.notification_model: ✓ NotificationCreate model with title and body fields
backend.push_endpoints: ✓ Public endpoints for register/unregister, admin endpoints for send/history/stats
backend.expo_push_integration: ✓ Uses httpx to call Expo Push API with proper error handling
backend.notification_storage: ✓ Stores notification records in MongoDB with all metadata
backend.auth_protection: ✓ All admin endpoints use Depends(get_current_user) and check role
backend.upsert_logic: ✓ Register endpoint uses upsert to update existing tokens
backend.active_flag: ✓ Unregister sets active=False instead of deleting
backend.chunking: ✓ Sends notifications in chunks of 100 for rate limiting
backend.is_premium_field: ✓ Location model has is_premium boolean field

frontend.admin_panel: ✓ Admin login, dashboard, location CRUD all working
frontend.premium_toggle: ✓ Edit location modal has premium checkbox
frontend.detail_page: ✓ Full detail page with all extended fields
frontend.testid_attributes: ✓ All interactive elements have testID for testing

performance_notes.expo_push_api: External Expo Push API calls take 1-3 seconds (acceptable for async operation)
performance_notes.notification_chunking: Chunks of 100 tokens prevent rate limiting and timeout issues
performance_notes.frontend_load_time: Main page loads in ~2-3 seconds with 16 locations and map
performance_notes.admin_dashboard: Admin dashboard loads quickly with location list

push_notification_notes.actual_delivery: Push notification actual delivery only works on physical devices with valid Expo push tokens (ExponentPushToken[...])
push_notification_notes.test_tokens: Test tokens used in automated tests will not receive actual notifications
push_notification_notes.expo_push_service: Backend successfully integrates with Expo Push Notification service (https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send)
push_notification_notes.response_structure: Notification send endpoint returns proper structure with total_devices, successful, failed counts
push_notification_notes.history_tracking: All sent notifications are stored in MongoDB for history/audit purposes

verified_business_badge_notes.backend_field: is_premium boolean field added to Location model
verified_business_badge_notes.admin_control: Admin can toggle premium status when creating/editing locations
verified_business_badge_notes.frontend_display: Admin dashboard shows count of premium locations
verified_business_badge_notes.future_enhancement: Frontend could display verified badge icon on premium location cards (not currently implemented in UI)
